info.title: RecreateSolutionStructure
info.description: A dotnet tool for recreating the directory tree for projects, specified in the solution file

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Recreate solution directory tree, i.e. for use in building a containerized .NET application with cached restore layer
Takes the path to a solution (.sln) file as input, and moves
Example: 'recreate-sln-structure MySolution.sln'

arguments.name: path to sln
arguments.description: File path to the solution (.sln) file
